---
name: Incorrect cleaning
about: Report a URL PlainLink changes incorrectly
title: "[False positive]: "
labels: false positive
---

## Dirty URL

Paste the original URL you copied.

## PlainLink Output

Paste the URL PlainLink produced.

## Expected URL

Paste the URL PlainLink should have produced instead.

## What Broke

Describe what stopped working, such as a login link, checkout link, invite, signed download, calendar link, or redirect.

## PlainLink Version

Paste the app or CLI version.

## Notes
